HEADLINE: From Analytics Spend to Boardroom Evidence
SUBHEADLINE: I help banking and financial services leaders prove the commercial value of their data investments—so they can secure funding, scale what works, and stop what doesn't.
TARGET_AUDIENCE: Chief Data Officers and senior data leaders in banking and financial services
SERVICE_1_DESCRIPTION: A structured review of your current analytics initiatives, designed to quantify their financial impact and identify where value is being captured—or lost.
SERVICE_2_DESCRIPTION: Translate credit risk model improvements into commercial outcomes—and build the business case for executive approval.
SERVICE_3_DESCRIPTION: A strategic planning engagement that delivers a prioritised, fundable analytics roadmap with executive sponsorship strategy.
